assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets a Content-Security-Policy header that includes frame-ancestors 'none' or frame-ancestors 'self'
Program.cs sets X-Frame-Options to DENY on IdentityServer UI paths
assertions.rationale: Line 135 sets X-Frame-Options: DENY. Applied globally rather than scoped to UI paths, but the assertion only requires it to be set to DENY — which it is.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures rate limiting with AddRateLimiter and a policy for the token endpoint with PermitLimit = 20
assertions.rationale: Lines 18-30 configure AddRateLimiter with token policy using FixedWindowLimiter with PermitLimit = 20.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures rate limiting for the authorize endpoint with PermitLimit = 10
assertions.rationale: Lines 33-40 configure authorize policy with FixedWindowLimiter with PermitLimit = 10.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls UseRateLimiter() in the middleware pipeline
